g.text: Robust Scaling: MAR vs MAD vs Mean (MAE) vs None

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif

g.text: Extreme outliers inflate Mean scale → looser threshold → moderate outliers leak in

path.style: fill: #ffffff; opacity: 0.8; stroke: #cccccc; stroke-linejoin: miter

text.style: font-size: 9px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: No Robustness — both tiers bias the fit

g.text: Mean (MAE) — extreme outliers inflate scale → moderate outliers slip through

g.text: MAD — centers on median residual first

path.style: fill: none; stroke: #3b82f6; stroke-width: 2.5; stroke-linecap: square

g.text: MAR — scale anchored to clean noise level → rejects all outliers
